allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); l=d['data']; print\(f\\"Title: {l['title']}\\nSeller: {l['seller']['displayName']} \({l['seller']['tier']}\)\\nPackages: {[p['name']+' $'+str\(p['price']\) for p in l['packages']]}\\nReviews: {len\([o for o in l['orders'] if o['review']]\)}\\"\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(f'{k}: {v}' for k in sorted\(deps\) if any\(x in k for x in ['blob','vercel','privy','prisma','next']\)\)\)")
